title: Shri Pathirakali Mariamman Temple
tagline: Shri Pathirakali Mariamman Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Shri Pathirakali Mariamman Temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Shri Pathirakali Mariamman Temple (Tamil: ஸ்ரீ பத்திரகாளி மாரியம்மன் திருக்கோவில்) is one of the oldest temples in Madurai district.
overview.description: Shri Pathirakali Mariamman Temple (Tamil: ஸ்ரீ பத்திரகாளி மாரியம்மன் திருக்கோவில்) is one of the oldest temples in Madurai district. The Thirumangalam city is known that the mangalyam for goddess Meenakshi of Madurai was designed and done here, so the name Tiru+Mangal(y)am came. In other way, it is said that when lord Murugan married Theivanai in Thiruparankundram (nearest to Tirumangalam), the "Tirumangalyam" was made here and hence the name came The temple is located 20 kilometres (12 mi) south from Madurai in India. The main shrine would be Shri Mariamman and the Utsava Deity were Shri Path

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: PKN Vidhyasala
topPlaces.description: PKN Vidhyasala (Tamil: பி.கே.என். வித்யாசாலா) is an Educational Trust which consists of 9 educational institutions including 2 higher secondary schools, 3 Matriculation schools, 2 Primary schools, 1 CBSE school and an Arts and Science College in the suburbs of Tirumangalam, Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Tirumangalam, Madurai
topPlaces.description: Tirumangalam is a town in the Madurai Metropolitan Area of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu also called as 'Thoongaa Nagarathin Thunai Nagaram' (Sub District of Madurai).

topPlaces.name: Karisalkalampatti
topPlaces.description: Karisalkalampatti is a village in the Madurai District of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located about 9 km from Thirumangalam, 30 km from Madurai, and 520 km from the state capital, Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Madurai-South taluk
topPlaces.description: Madurai-South taluk is a Thiruparankundram taluk of Madurai district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

items.note: PKN Vidhyasala (Tamil: பி.கே.என். வித்யாசாலா) is an Educational Trust which consists of 9 educational institutions including 2 higher secondary schools, 3 Matriculation schools, 2 Primary schools, 1 CBSE school and an Arts and Science College in the suburbs of Tirumangalam, Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India.
Tirumangalam is a town in the Madurai Metropolitan Area of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu also called as 'Thoongaa Nagarathin Thunai Nagaram' (Sub District of Madurai).
Karisalkalampatti is a village in the Madurai District of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located about 9 km from Thirumangalam, 30 km from Madurai, and 520 km from the state capital, Chennai.
Madurai-South taluk is a Thiruparankundram taluk of Madurai district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Pathirakali Mariamman Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Pathirakali Mariamman Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Pathirakali Mariamman Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (13 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (19 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Pathirakali Mariamman Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Pathirakali Mariamman Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Pathirakali Mariamman Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Pathirakali Mariamman Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Pathirakali Mariamman Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are PKN Vidhyasala, Tirumangalam, Madurai, Karisalkalampatti, Madurai-South taluk.
